title: SlippyPlays 5k
description: its 5k texture pack of slippy plays!!!
body:
# **SLIPPY'S 5K TEXTURE PACK**
# ![Slippy's 5k Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9c51afb1539874d5ede67558922f87732c2eb94.png)

# **CUSTOM ITEM**
![CUSTOM ITEM ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dddb793422768c456a7b5655440cab8c4e975df0_0.webp)

**Game Version :  1.20.1 AND UPPER**

**Pack Version :  1.0**

Features : 
      
> -         Custom Animations
> -         
> -         Custom Weapon Textures
> -         
> -         Custom Entity Models
> -         
> -         Secret Messages!
> -   
> -         Custom Banner Colours
> -  
> -         Custom Totem Particles
> -        
> -         No More Explosion Particles!
> -        
> -         3D Crystal
      
## **Installation**
For PC Users -

Download the File from the Versions Tab

Open your resourcepacks folder in your .minecraft folder

Copy and paste the .zip / .rar file into the resourcepacks folder

  Slippy's_5k!  has been installed!

If you face any more issues,REPORT ON DISCORD
